panels.title: Consume Rate
panels.description: Tracks the message consumption throughput for this consumer group over time. A drop in consume rate often precedes a rise in consumer lag.

panels.title: Process Rate
panels.description: Tracks the rate at which this consumer group processes messages after receiving them. A widening gap between consume and process rates signals slow message handling logic.

panels.title: Rebalance Events
panels.description: Tracks rebalance frequency for this consumer group over time. Each rebalance pauses consumption, so frequent events degrade overall throughput.

panels.title: Assigned Partitions
panels.description: Tracks the number of partitions assigned to this consumer group over time. Drops indicate members leaving the group; increases follow new member joins or topic partition expansion.
